## InferFormSchema type

Infers the schema type from a FormSpec.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export type InferFormSchema<F extends FormSpec<readonly FormElement[]>> = F extends FormSpec<infer Elements> ? InferSchema<Elements> : never;
```
